run.window_expansion_note: Extended search pass to May 9–10 to verify signal density; all published items fall within the original May 11–14 window.

published_items.title: Anthropic Launches Claude for Small Business with 15 Workflows and 7 Integrations

key_claims.claim: 7 platform integrations: QuickBooks, PayPal, HubSpot, Canva, DocuSign, Google Workspace, Microsoft 365
Roadshow starts 14 May in Chicago, 100 small business leaders per stop

published_items.caveats: Pricing not disclosed. 'Agentic' framing vendor-applied; degree of human-in-loop not independently tested.

published_items.title: Claude Code v2.1.141 Adds Hook Notifications, Workspace Identity Federation, and Rewind Compression

key_claims.claim: terminalSequence field in hook JSON for desktop notifications/window titles/bells without controlling terminal
ANTHROPIC_WORKSPACE_ID env var for workload identity federation
claude agents --cwd <path> scopes session list to directory
Rewind menu adds 'Summarize up to here' for context compression

published_items.title: GitHub Copilot CLI v1.0.45 Adds /autopilot Command

key_claims.claim: /autopilot slash command toggles between interactive and autonomous modes mid-session

published_items.title: Meta AI App Rolls Out Voice Conversation, Live Camera, and Threads Integration
published_items.tier_nuance: Meta primary blog post for May 12 rollout not directly fetched. 9to5Mac used as best available secondary. Upgrade to T2 when Meta primary confirmed.

cross_references.role: background — Muse Spark model launch April 8

published_items.caveats: Meta primary blog post not confirmed via direct fetch in this run.

published_items.title: Judgment Labs Raises $32M for AI Agent Evaluation Infrastructure

key_claims.claim: $32M combined seed and Series A, Lightspeed Venture Partners lead

published_items.title: Google Threat Intelligence Documents First Confirmed AI-Generated Zero-Day Exploit
published_items.tier_nuance: Multiple T2 outlets corroborate (Bloomberg, The Register, Axios). Google TIG's own blog post not directly fetched in this run.

key_claims.claim: First documented AI-generated zero-day in active attack operation
key_claims.source: CNBC 2026-05-11 (T2), corroborated by Bloomberg, The Register, Axios

key_claims.claim: 2FA bypass in unnamed open-source web administration platform
Google patched flaw with vendor before exploitation

published_items.title: Wispr AI Reported in Talks for $260M Round at $2B Valuation
published_items.caveats: Bloomberg based on unnamed sources. No term sheet signed. Deal not confirmed by Wispr or Menlo Ventures. User count is vendor-claimed.

published_items.title: Anthropic Reported in Talks for $30B Round at $900B Valuation

key_claims.claim: No term sheet signed as of report date

cross_references.role: earlier report, corroborating on valuation figure

published_items.caveats: Unnamed sources. Deal not confirmed by Anthropic. Round size revised from $50B (April reports) to >=30B (May 12 Bloomberg) suggesting terms in flux.
